name: Spiral Discharge
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>螺旋砲撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スパイラル・ディスチャージ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While "Gaia the Dragon Champion" is in your Monster Zone, your opponent's monsters can only target "Gaia the Dragon Champion" for attacks. When an attack is declared involving your "Gaia the Dragon Champion": You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Spiral Discharge" once per turn.
eff: While "Gaia the Dragon Champion" is in your Monster Zone, your opponent's monsters can only target "Gaia the Dragon Champion" for attacks. When an attack is declared involving your "Gaia the Dragon Champion": You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Spiral Discharge" once per turn.

attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
